title: Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
summary: Anthropic has received final approval for a $1.5 billion copyright settlement, resolving one legal case but leaving unresolved the broader question of whether AI companies can legally use copyrighted works for training. This landmark settlement signals increasing scrutiny of AI training practices but highlights that courts have not yet fully addressed the industry's licensing approach.
content: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.

zh.title: Anthropic的标志性15亿美元版权和解案获批
zh.summary: Anthropic已获得15亿美元版权和解案的最终批准，解决了一项法律诉讼，但对AI公司是否可以合法使用受版权保护的作品进行训练的更广泛问题仍未解决。这项具有里程碑意义的和解表明AI训练实践面临日益增多的审查，但也突显法院尚未完全解决该行业的许可方式问题。
